page_metadata.biotools__summary: This web-server is a two-level multi-label predictor. It can be used to identify an uncharacterized peptide as antimicrobial peptide (AMP) or non-AMP according to its sequences information alone.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This web-server is a two-level multi-label predictor. It can be used to identify an uncharacterized peptide as antimicrobial peptide (AMP) or non-AMP according to its sequences information alone.
